org.apache.flink.api.connector.sink

## Interface Committer<CommT>

  * Type Parameters:
    `CommT` \- The type of information needed to commit the staged data

All Superinterfaces:
    [AutoCloseable](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/lang/AutoCloseable.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.lang")

All Known Implementing Classes:
    [FileCommitter](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/connector/file/sink/committer/FileCommitter.html> "class in org.apache.flink.connector.file.sink.committer")

* * *




        [@Experimental](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/annotation/Experimental.html> "annotation in org.apache.flink.annotation")
        public interface Committer<CommT>
        extends [AutoCloseable](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/lang/AutoCloseable.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.lang")

The `Committer` is responsible for committing the data staged by the sink.

---|---
`[List](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/util/List.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.util")<[CommT](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/connector/sink/Committer.html> "type parameter in Committer")>` | `[commit](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/connector/sink/Committer.html#commit-java.util.List->)([List](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/util/List.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.util")<[CommT](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/connector/sink/Committer.html> "type parameter in Committer")> committables)` Commit the given list of `CommT`.

`[close](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/lang/AutoCloseable.html?is-external=true#close--> "class or interface in java.lang")`

  *     * ### Method Detail

      * #### commit

            [List](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/util/List.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.util")<[CommT](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/connector/sink/Committer.html> "type parameter in Committer")> commit([List](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/util/List.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.util")<[CommT](<../../../../../../org/apache/flink/api/connector/sink/Committer.html> "type parameter in Committer")> committables)
                        throws [IOException](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/io/IOException.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.io")

Commit the given list of `CommT`.

Parameters:
    `committables` \- A list of information needed to commit data staged by the sink.
Returns:
    A list of `CommT` needed to re-commit, which is needed in case we implement a "commit-with-retry" pattern.
Throws:
    `[IOException](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/io/IOException.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.io")` \- if the commit operation fail and do not want to retry any more.
